_comment: Claude Code ships an MCP-management CLI. Prefer running:
claude mcp add --transport stdio --scope user ssh-bridge -- ~/.local/bin/ssh-mcp
If you do edit by hand, this is the shape of the entry to add under the
WARNING: Do NOT add autoApprove for any of ssh-mcp tools.
The tools provided (ssh_exec, sftp_op, ssh_group_exec, etc.) can have
unbounded effects on remote systems and must not be auto-approved.
